description_long: This is a rectangular, mustard-yellow sleeping bag with visible stitched seams forming a grid pattern across its surface. The fabric appears to be a synthetic material, likely nylon or polyester, with a slightly crinkled texture and a matte finish. There is a small white fabric tag or label sewn onto one corner, which may contain branding or care instructions. The sleeping bag is shown fully unzipped and laid flat, with no visible hood or compression straps. The edges are neatly hemmed, and the bag appears to be lightly padded, suggesting an insulated interior. No visible patch repairs or significant wear are present.
description: A mustard-yellow, rectangular sleeping bag with stitched seams, a small white label, and a lightly padded, matte fabric surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sleeping bag's rectangular shape, stitched grid pattern, and a white label in the lower right corner.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the sleeping bag and the white label now visible in the lower left corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted mustard-yellow surface and the label in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the label now in the upper right corner and the stitched seams clearly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small white fabric label is visible in one corner, but no clear brand logo or readable text is discernible.
